Package org.apache.bookkeeper.client.api

Interface BKException.Code

All Known Subinterfaces:
BKException.Code
Enclosing class:
BKException
public static interface BKException.Code
Codes which represent the various exception types.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    AddEntryQuorumTimeoutException
    Add entry operation timeouts on waiting quorum responses.
    static final int
    BookieHandleNotAvailableException
    Bookies are not available.
    static final int
    ClientClosedException
    Executing operations on a closed client.
    static final int
    DataUnknownException
    Operations failed due to ledger data in an unknown state.
    static final int
    DigestMatchException
    Digest doesn't match on returned entries.
    static final int
    DigestNotInitializedException
    Digest Manager is not initialized (client error).
    static final int
    DuplicateEntryIdException
    Duplicated entry id is found when LedgerHandleAdv.addEntry(long, byte[]).
    static final int
    IllegalOpException
    Operation is illegal.
    static final int
    IncorrectParameterException
    Incorrect parameters (operations are absolutely not executed).
    static final int
    InterruptedException
    Synchronous operations are interrupted.
    static final int
    LedgerClosedException
    Executing operations on a closed ledger handle.
    static final int
    LedgerExistException
    Ledger already exists.
    static final int
    LedgerFencedException
    Operations failed due to ledgers are fenced.
    static final int
    LedgerIdOverflowException
    Ledger id overflow happens on ledger manager.
    static final int
    LedgerRecoveryException
    Ledger recovery operations failed.
    static final int
    MetadataSerializationException
    Failure to serialize metadata.
    static final int
    MetadataVersionException
    Bad version on executing metadata operations.
    static final int
    MetaStoreException
    Meta store operations failed.
    static final int
    NoBookieAvailableException
    Unused.
    static final int
    NoSuchEntryException
    No such entry exists.
    static final int
    NoSuchLedgerExistsException
    No such ledger exists.
    static final int
    NoSuchLedgerExistsOnMetadataServerException
    No such ledger exists one metadata server.
    static final int
    NotEnoughBookiesException
    Not enough bookies available to form an ensemble.
    static final int
    OK
    Everything is OK.
    static final int
    ProtocolVersionException
    Protocol version is wrong (operations are absolutely not executed).
    static final int
    QuorumException
    Unused.
    static final int
    ReadException
    Read operations failed (bookie error).
    static final int
    ReplicationException
    Generic exception code used to propagate in replication pipeline.
    static final int
    SecurityException
     
    static final int
    TimeoutException
    Operations timeouts.
    static final int
    TooManyRequestsException
    Operations failed due to too many requests in the queue.
    static final int
    UnauthorizedAccessException
    Operations failed due to unauthorized.
    static final int
    UnclosedFragmentException
    Replication failed due to unclosed fragments.
    static final int
    UnexpectedConditionException
    Unexpected condition.
    static final int
    UNINITIALIZED
    A placer holder (unused).
    static final int
    WriteException
    Write operations failed (bookie error).
    static final int
    WriteOnReadOnlyBookieException
    Write operations failed due to bookies are readonly.
    static final int
    ZKException
    ZooKeeper operations failed.
